2605.27082.title: Can Broad Biomedical Knowledge be Contextualized into Scenario-Grounded Propositions?
2605.27082.paper_summary: Biomedical discovery often requires connecting broad biomedical knowledge with specific experimental or clinical data. Background knowledge suggests relevant mechanisms but is usually too general to map directly onto dataset variables, while data-driven patterns can be dataset-specific and hard to interpret mechanistically. We study this missing link as knowledge contextualization: transforming broad biomedical knowledge into evidence-supported, scenario-grounded propositions that domain experts can inspect, replay, and validate. We propose SCENE, a bi-level multi-agent framework that treats knowledge contextualization as iterative search. The upper level converts broad knowledge into search directions and grounds them in the dataset schema. The lower level executes these directions through multi-objective optimization to identify concrete propositions that balance evidential strength and data support. Feedback between the two levels progressively refines the search. We evaluate SCENE in two settings: discovering patient subgroups with heterogeneous treatment benefits in clinical trial scenarios, and identifying context-specific biological responses in LINCS L1000 studies. In clinical trials, SCENE discovers specific, well-supported subgroups and outperforms existing baselines. In L1000 studies, SCENE identifies perturbational contexts with strong target-response matching and high positive rates. These results show that SCENE bridges broad knowledge and scenario-specific evidence, producing traceable, inspectable hypotheses for follow-up validation.
2605.27082.paper_summary_zh: 生物醫學發現通常需要將廣泛的生物醫學知識與特定的實驗或臨床數據相連接。背景知識暗示相關的機制，但通常過於一般，無法直接映射到數據集變量上，而數據驅動的模式則可能是特定於數據集的，並且在機制上難以解釋。我們將這一缺失的聯繫研究為知識的情境化：將廣泛的生物醫學知識轉化為有證據支持的、基於情境的命題，讓領域專家可以檢查、重播和驗證。我們提出了 SCENE，一個雙層多代理框架，將知識的情境化視為迭代搜索。上層將廣泛的知識轉換為搜索方向，並將其基於數據集架構進行定位。下層通過多目標優化執行這些方向，以識別平衡證據強度和數據支持的具體命題。兩個層之間的反饋逐步完善了搜索。我們在兩個場景中評估 SCENE：在臨床試驗場景中發現具有異質治療效益的患者亞組，以及在 LINCS L1000 研究中識別特定情境的生物反應。在臨床試驗中，SCENE 發現了具體且有良好支持的亞組，並超越了現有的基準。在 L1000 研究中，SCENE 識別了具有強烈目標-反應匹配和高正率的擾動情境。這些結果顯示，SCENE 橋接了廣泛的知識和特定情境的證據，產生可追蹤、可檢查的假設以供後續驗證。
2605.27082.author: Qingyuan Zeng et.al.
2605.27082.authors: Qingyuan Zeng, Ziyang Chen, Pengxiang Cai, Zixin Guan, Anglin Liu, Lang Qin, Xinyao Lai, Jintai Chen
